channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cruise Ship Evacuation Amid Suspected Hantavirus
item.description: Three individuals were evacuated from a cruise ship due to concerns about a hantavirus outbreak. Swiss authorities also reported a case among former passengers.

item.title: Iran live updates: Pakistan PM thanks Trump for pausing ship escorts
item.description: President Trump announced Project Freedom on Sunday, stating the Navy would ensure ships safely navigate restricted waters.

item.title: Brazil school attack: 13-year-old student involved in deaths
item.description: Authorities report a 13-year-old student is accused of an attack at a Rio Branco school, resulting in two fatalities.

item.title: Poll Shows Positive View of Pope, Negative Reaction to Trump's Post
item.description: A recent poll examines American perspectives on Pope Francis and reactions to a post by Donald Trump.
